overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto IV showing the protagonist walking across an industrial harbor bridge. The scene features weathered warehouse architecture, metal railings, docked vessels, and overcast lighting typical of the game's gritty urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor bridge walkway with overhead truss structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the bridge walkway wearing a leather jacket and backpack, moving toward the far end of the structure

entered.detail: large beige industrial building with multiple windows running parallel to the bridge walkway
red-brown metal safety railing lining the edge of the bridge overlooking the water
calm industrial harbor water with gentle ripples visible between the railings
small vessel moored at the dock visible in the harbor water
large steel support structure and framework of the bridge becoming visible as the character progresses
underside of the bridge deck creating partial overhead cover
weathered stone tile walkway surface showing signs of wear and moisture

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily across an industrial harbor bridge with a large warehouse building running parallel on the left. Metal railings line the right side overlooking calm harbor waters where a small tugboat is docked. As the character progresses, massive steel bridge trusses become visible on the left, and the walkway passes partially underneath the bridge deck. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the desaturated industrial landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an industrial harbor bridge that transitions from an open walkway into the shadow of massive steel architecture. It begins with the character walking steadily beside a large warehouse building, with metal railings to the right overlooking calm harbor waters and a docked tugboat. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts as the walkway passes partially underneath the bridge deck, bringing the scale of the environment into focus. The scene then expands to reveal massive steel bridge trusses looming on the left, all under a desaturated, overcast sky that casts a diffused light across the gritty landscape.
